evals.name: happy-path-with-params
evals.prompt: I'm picking a static site generator for a technical blog. Compare options across build speed, plugin ecosystem, theming flexibility, and learning curve. Recommend one for a solo dev who values fast iteration. Save the report to .omo/research-recommended/ssg-pick/.
evals.expected_output: shortlist of ≥5 SSGs, matrix on the 4 stated params, recommendation with confidence, all 4 output files written

evals.name: no-params-inference-gate
evals.prompt: Research the best embedding model for code search in a RAG pipeline. I don't have specific evaluation criteria in mind — figure out what matters.
evals.expected_output: skill infers parameters (e.g., dimension, latency, code-specificity, cost, license), presents them to user for refinement BEFORE searching

evals.name: vague-topic-clarification
evals.expected_output: skill asks at least one clarifying question (what domain, what decision) before searching
